notes: The misc-fixes-1 milestone contains two bug fix features: (1) fix-api-key-partial-logging removes partial API key logging in tests, (2) llm-backend-trait-stream-method adds stream() method to LlmBackend trait. Neither feature has fulfills relationships to validation assertions. All assertions that could be affected by these changes (VAL-LLM-001 through VAL-LIVE-004) were already marked as passed in a prior scrutiny validation round. No user-facing assertions required additional testing beyond what was already verified.
